Explanation: This report presents a technically sound analytical framework for chromatographic instrument stability monitoring. Strengths include well-structured methodology (AsLS filtering, piecewise linear regression, Shewhart control charting), clear writing with proper scientific terminology, and logical organization. However, significant limitations reduce overall impact: (1) Figures referenced (Figure 1) are missing or placeholder sections, severely limiting visual communication; (2) No quantitative results are presented—slopes, p-values, SNR values, and control limits are mentioned but not reported; (3) Data analysis depth is understated; conclusions about detector instability vs. column degradation lack supporting numerical evidence; (4) The appendix contains incomplete code without full implementation details or validation results. The approach is methodologically appropriate but lacks empirical rigor in presentation. The work would benefit from actual data visualizations, quantitative results tables, and complete code implementation with demonstrated outputs.
